title: Status change the color of another column
excerpt: I’m making price list for labor and material. The coloring rows and cells options are a big help in this process. However, it would be a much bigger help if Monday.com would integrate “If” options in the “Conditional Col…

posts.author: Joshing (Joshua)
posts.cookedHtml: I’m making price list for labor and material. The coloring rows and cells options are a big help in this process. However, it would be a much bigger help if Monday.com would integrate “If” options in the “Conditional Coloring” section. Example: “IF Status is X make Column A red IF empty.”
